About Us

Computer Engineering is one of the most preferred professions. Due to its rapid elaboration, “Computer Engineering” is leading among the future professions. The main philosophy of our department is to educate engineers equipped with up-to-date knowledge who can produce knowledge and respond to the needs of the academic life and the business sector successfully.

The research fields of our academicians are analysis and design of algorithms, microprocessor systems, embedded systems, computer architecture, computer networks, database systems and database application development, computational geometry, parallel programming, software engineering, and high-performance computing.

Our students specialize in software engineering, planning of computer networks, mobile applications, and cloud computing. The department’s undergraduate curriculum includes the necessary training for Cisco Certified Network Assoc., Oracle Application Development, Microsoft CRM Dynamics, and EMC Proven Professional certification.

The Computer Engineering Department aims to become a leader in education and research areas of our country and become a well-known department in the international arena.
